title: Basic JavaScript IIFE
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript IIFE. Focus on implementing IIFE syntax correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript IIFE
description: Create a function that uses IIFE syntax and Module pattern with IIFE together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript IIFE Project
description: Build a small application that applies IIFE syntax, Module pattern with IIFE, Private variables and methods in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript IIFE
description: The following code has bugs related to IIFE syntax. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript IIFE
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with IIFE syntax and Module pattern with IIFE.
